claims: The skill requests Read, Edit, Glob, and Grep permissions which are not strictly necessary for its primary purpose of generating JSON Schema definitions from provided parameter definitions. The core functionality (creating schemas from input data) only requires Write to output files and possibly Bash for formatting. Reading, editing, and searching existing files are not required for the stated purpose and could be used to access unrelated system or project files beyond schema generation.
